title: Sum of Cubes
aria_label: a cubed plus b cubed equals, open parenthesis, a plus b, close parenthesis, times, open parenthesis, a squared minus a b plus b squared, close parenthesis
notes: Memorize the pattern: the first factor matches the sign of the original (plus), and the trinomial follows SOAP — Same, Opposite, Always Positive.
SOAP: Same sign as original (+), Opposite sign (−ab), Always Positive (+b²).
The trinomial factor (a² − ab + b²) does not factor further over the reals.
Both terms must be perfect cubes: 1, 8, 27, 64, 125, ... and their variable equivalents.
Do not confuse with the difference of cubes — the only change is the sign of the linear factor.
applications: Factoring cubic polynomials that match the sum-of-cubes pattern.
Simplifying rational expressions involving cubic terms.
Foundation for polynomial long division and higher-degree factoring.

es.title: Suma de Cubos
notes: Memoriza el patrón: el primer factor tiene el mismo signo del original (más), y el trinomio sigue SOAP — Mismo, Opuesto, Siempre Positivo.
SOAP: Mismo signo (+), Signo Opuesto (−ab), Siempre Positivo (+b²).
El factor trinomio (a² − ab + b²) no se factoriza más sobre los reales.
Ambos términos deben ser cubos perfectos: 1, 8, 27, 64, 125...
No confundas con la diferencia de cubos — solo cambia el signo del factor lineal.

ht.title: Sòm Kib
notes: Memorize modèl la: premye faktè a gen menm siy ak orijinal la (plis), ak trinòm lan swiv SOAP — Menm, Opozit, Toujou Pozitif.
SOAP: Menm siy (+), Siy Opozit (−ab), Toujou Pozitif (+b²).
Faktè trinòm nan (a² − ab + b²) pa faktorizasyon plis sou reyèl.
Tou de tèm dwe se kib pafè: 1, 8, 27, 64, 125...
Pa konfon ak diferans kib — sèl chanjman se siy faktè lineyè a.
